plan: Fix QuerySet.ordered in django/db/models/query.py: when the ordering would only come from Meta.ordering (default_ordering path), also require that the query is not a GROUP BY/aggregation query, since the SQL compiler (get_order_by in sql/compiler.py) drops the model's default ordering for grouped queries. Concretely, return False if self.query.group_by is set and no explicit order_by/extra_order_by exists, so 'elif self.query.default_ordering and self.query.get_meta().ordering' additionally checks 'and not self.query.group_by'. No compiler change is needed; sql/compiler.py and sql/query.py are only reference points for the group_by behavior.
